id.description: Raw API's own state id (already present on every state object; passed through verbatim by projection: passthrough, matching legacy's mapRecord which never overwrites an already-present id).

abbreviation.description: Also stamped as the keyed_object key_field (the 'data' object's own key), redundant with the raw field of the same name for documentation purposes.

stream.description: Static-literal computed_field naming which stream this record came from, matching legacy's derived marker field.
